subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the firm cord! By the life of God, the dove hath winged its flight through the garden of splendour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استمسک بالعروه الوثقی لعمرالله ان سرب الورقاء فی ایکه السناء و حدیقه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
